TextView.android:text: I consent to AI transformation auditing, capture, and session logging. Consent is required before connecting to the live engine.
Share your code with friends. When they sign up & buy credits, you both earn 500 free credits.\nReferral credits earned: 0
CHOOSE HOW YOU WANT TO GET STARTED
Pay $75 one-time activation fee – unlock full permanent access + buy credits
Recommended for serious users. One-time fee, lifetime access to all features.
Purchase a Starter Pack with 500 credits and test the platform before activating
Starter credits let you stream for ~4 minutes. Once exhausted, you'll need to activate your license to continue.
Credits power your live AI sessions at 120 credits/minute.\nPurchase once, use anytime - credits never expire.
After purchase via WhatsApp or email, you will receive a Credit Key to enter below.
This ID is unique to your device.
Having trouble? Contact support on Telegram
